title: Audio Video Muxer
desc: Combine video (no audio) with separate audio track. Replace or add audio to video. Browser-side muxing. Free audio video merger.

title: Loop Video Maker
desc: Loop a video clip N times to create extended looping video. Choose count or duration. Browser-side export. Free loop video maker.

title: Slow Motion Maker
desc: Create slow motion video. Choose speed (0.25x, 0.5x, 0.75x). Frame interpolation preview. Browser-side export. Free slowmo maker.

title: Time Lapse Maker
desc: Speed up video to create time-lapse. Choose speed multiplier (2x-100x). Browser-side export. Free time lapse video maker.

title: Video Aspect Ratio Converter
desc: Convert video aspect ratio for any platform: 16:9 (YouTube), 9:16 (TikTok/Reels), 1:1 (Instagram), 4:5 (Facebook). Browser-based preview.

title: Video Compressor Online
desc: Compress video files in browser. Reduce file size by adjusting bitrate, resolution and quality. Free client-side video compressor.

title: Video Flipper
desc: Flip video horizontally or vertically online. Free browser-based video mirroring tool with live preview and frame export. No upload.

title: Video Frame Extractor
desc: Extract multiple frames from a video at regular intervals. Free online video frame grabber for analysis, GIFs, and stop motion. No upload.

title: Video Joiner
desc: Combine multiple video clips into one. Add videos in order, preview sequence, merge into single file. Free online video joiner.

title: Video Metadata Viewer
desc: View video metadata online: duration, resolution, codec, bitrate, frame rate, file size. Free browser-based video info inspector. No upload.

title: Video Resolution Converter
desc: Change video resolution by scaling frames. Convert 4K to 1080p, 1080p to 720p, or any custom resolution. Browser-based, no upload.

title: Video Reverser
desc: Reverse video playback in browser. Play video backwards and download reversed clip. Free client-side video reverser.

title: Video Rotator
desc: Rotate video 90, 180, or 270 degrees online. Free browser-based video rotation tool with live preview and frame export. No upload.

title: Video Speed Changer
desc: Change video playback speed from 0.25x to 4x. Preview videos at any speed and extract frames at modified rate. No upload, browser-based.

title: Video Thumbnail Maker
desc: Extract a thumbnail image from any video at a chosen timestamp. Free online video thumbnail generator. No upload, browser-based.

title: Video to GIF Converter
desc: Convert video files to animated GIF. Set start time, duration, size and frame rate. Free client-side video to GIF converter.

title: Video to MP3 Converter
desc: Extract audio from video files as WAV. Convert video to audio in browser. Free client-side video to audio converter.

title: Video Trimmer
desc: Trim and cut video files in browser. Set start and end time to extract clips. Free client-side video trimmer.

title: Video Volume Booster
desc: Boost video volume beyond 100% using Web Audio API. Watch videos louder than browser default. No upload, browser-based audio amplification.

title: Video Watermark Adder
desc: Add text or image watermark to video. Position, opacity, size. Browser-side preview and export. Free video watermark tool.
